# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Snapshot Configuration
snapshot_repo_type: s3

# S3 Storage Settings
s3:
  bucket: my-elasticsearch-bucket
  endpoint: s3.amazonaws.com
  aws_access_key_id: MY_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
  aws_secret_access_key: MY_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

snapshot_dir: /var/lib/elasticsearch/snapshots

snapshots:
  - name: hourly_backup
    schedule:
      cron: 0 12 * * *

restore_snapshot:
  repository: my-elasticsearch-bucket
  snapshot: hourly_backup_2023.04.01
